calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2013 Off Calendar

Application For Default Judgment And Statement Of The Case
Off Calendar Sep-17-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Julian T. Lastowski, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Chicago Title Insurance Company.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Kenneth A. Jones.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.
Nancy Van Tassel sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
Declarations submitted to the court admitted in evidence.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $23,437.10
Pre-Judgment Interest at the legal rate of 10% per annum or $6.42 per day from December 16, 2011 to August 1, 2013, in the amount of: $3,813.48
Costs: $450.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $27,700.58

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-27-2013 Continued To Oct-23-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2013 Continued To Sep-11-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
